data.title: 国际服未花第二支MV公布
data.summary: Sensei! Mika’s second music video, “Incandescent Blue and the Comet” is now available! Come check it
data.body:
Sensei!
Mika’s second music video, “Incandescent Blue and the Comet” is now available!
Come check it out now, and happy new year!

➡️ Watch now: https://youtu.be/yLPnv3QS-0Q

#BlueArchive
